manager: M3 Opus manager (detached) — best-of-N detailed design for the ask-chatgpt v2 rewrite
directive: Produce the CONCRETE, implementable detailed design (team/evidence/reports/M3-detailed-design.md) that M4 (offline core) and M5 (capture/scrape/send) will follow. DESIGN ONLY — no production source changes, no real-site/browser legs, no commit. Run best-of-N per agent-rigor. Leave design doc + handoff (team/evidence/handoffs/M3-design.md) for the team lead.
constraints: DESIGN ONLY: no edits to src/, pyproject.toml, tests/ (production source). Writing markdown design docs under team/ is the deliverable.
No real-site/browser/CDP legs (offline design). No git commit/push. Never move/commit stable. Never uv tool install/upgrade/reinstall.

Dispatch policy (HARD): design lenses are pi WORKERS via .claude/skills/manager/references/launchers/parent-claude/pi-watch.sh pointed at contract files under team/contracts/. NEVER the Claude Agent tool. (claude-watch.sh would be for a sub-manager; not needed here.)
Workers inherit nothing: every constraint+M2 fact+gotcha fix+safety invariant is transcribed into team/contracts/M3-common-constraints.md, which every worker contract names as required reading.
Best-of-N is the default; never shrink N for resource caution (operator policy). Producer never raises trust on its own work; verification is itself best-of-N (distinct dimensions).
Honor EVERY M2 ground-truth finding (auth/OAI headers; 17MB/5k nodes; DR turn_exchange_id grouping; attachment shapes; completion signals; live selectors). Honor EVERY safety invariant.
plan: 5 parallel design lenses (pi) -> 1 synthesizer (writes M3-detailed-design.md) -> 3-dimension verification panel (pi) -> manager triage/revision -> manager handoff.
estimate_wall_clock: ESTIMATE 2026-06-18 14:21: per-pi-worker ~12-25 min (read 4 source files + write detailed design). Lenses parallel => ~25 min if pi runs concurrent, ~2h if pi serializes (to be measured from run-dir metadata). Synth ~15-25 min. 3 verifiers parallel ~20 min. Total ~1-2.5h. ACTUAL tracked from .pi-workers/<run>/metadata.txt started_at + status mtime.
